source_pr.title: plan: fix a bug in `topn_push_down` rule.
source_pr.body:
## What have you changed? (mandatory)

`ColumnIndices` will return `nil` if not all column in the schema.
So here will perform wrong action if the by item contains column from both sides.

## What are the type of the changes (mandatory)?

The currently defined types are listed below, please pick one of the types for this PR by removing the others:

- Bug fix

## How has this PR been tested (mandatory)?

unit test.

## Refer to a related PR or issue link (optional)

fix #6864

symptoms: sql: "select ifnull(t1.b, t2.a) from t t1 left join t t2 on t1.e=t2.e order by ifnull(t1.b, t2.a) limit 5", (plan/logical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select ifnull(t1.b, t2.a) from t t1 left join t t2 on t1.e=t2.e order by ifnull(t1.b, t2.a) limit 5", (plan/logical_plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: Patch fixes TopN pushdown rule correctness and adds plan tests; it is not a targeted flaky-test stabilization change.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: sql: "select ifnull(t1.b, t2.a) from t t1 left join t t2 on t1.e=t2.e order by ifnull(t1.b, t2.a) limit 5", (plan/logical_plan_test.go)
